languages.text: {n}Себериан поднимает руку, сжимающую Багряную пляску Кхейна, и некоторое время разглядывает клинок.{/n} "Начало всех бед и свидетель окончательной победы... это оружие должно принадлежать вам, {name}. Примите его — оно достойно быть во владении только Вольного Торговца династии фон Валанциус".

{n}Seberian raises his hand with the Crimson Dance of Khaine in his grasp and studies the blade for a while.{/n} "The origin of all my troubles, and a witness to my final victory... This weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан поднимает руку, сжимающую Багряную пляску Кхейна, и некоторое время разглядывает клинок.{/n} "Начало всех бед и свидетель окончательной победы... это оружие должно принадлежать вам, {name}. Примите его — оно достойно быть во владении только Вольного Торговца династии фон Валанциус".

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian raises his hand, the Bloody-Handed Fury clenched in it, and studies the blade for a while.{/n} "The origin of all my troubles, and a witness to my final victory... this weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."

This weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."

{n}Seberian raises his hand with the Crimson Dance of Khaine in his grasp and studies the blade for a while.{/n} "The origin of all my troubles, and a witness to my final victory... This weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."

languages.text: {n}Seberian hebt seine Hand mit dem Blutroten Tanz von Khaine und betrachtet die Klinge eine Weile.{/n} "Der Ursprung all meiner Probleme und eine Zeugin meines Sieges ... Diese Waffe sollte Euch gehören, {name}. Nehmt sie an, denn allein {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin} des Hauses von Valancius sollte sie führen."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raises his hand with the Crimson Dance of Khaine in his grasp and studies the blade for a while.{/n} "The origin of all my troubles, and a witness to my final victory... This weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian hebt seine Hand mit dem Blutroten Tanz von Khaine und betrachtet die Klinge eine Weile.{/n} "Der Ursprung all meiner Probleme und eine Zeugin meines Sieges ... Diese Waffe sollte Euch gehören, {name}. Nehmt sie an, denn allein {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin} des Hauses von Valancius sollte sie führen."

languages.text: {n}Seberian lève la main tenant fermement la Danse écarlate de Khaine et observe l'épée avec attention pendant quelques instants.{/n} « La source de tous mes ennuis, et un témoin de mon ultime victoire... Cette arme vous revient, {name}. Acceptez-la, car {mf|seul un libre-marchand|seule une libre-marchande} de la maison von Valancius est digne de la posséder. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raises his hand with the Crimson Dance of Khaine in his grasp and studies the blade for a while.{/n} "The origin of all my troubles, and a witness to my final victory... This weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian lève la main tenant fermement la Danse écarlate de Khaine et observe l'épée avec attention pendant quelques instants.{/n} « La source de tous mes ennuis, et un témoin de mon ultime victoire... Cette arme vous revient, {name}. Acceptez-la, car {mf|seul un libre-marchand|seule une libre-marchande} de la maison von Valancius est digne de la posséder. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian alza la mano que empuña la Danza Carmesí de Khaine y estudia la espada durante un tiempo.{/n} «El origen de todos mis problemas y el testigo de mi triunfo final... Este arma debería estar en sus manos, {name}. Acéptela, pues solo un{mf||a} Comerciante Independiente de la casa von Valancius es dign{mf|o|a} de portarla».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raises his hand with the Crimson Dance of Khaine in his grasp and studies the blade for a while.{/n} "The origin of all my troubles, and a witness to my final victory... This weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian alza la mano que empuña la Danza Carmesí de Khaine y estudia la espada durante un tiempo.{/n} «El origen de todos mis problemas y el testigo de mi triunfo final... Este arma debería estar en sus manos, {name}. Acéptela, pues solo un{mf||a} Comerciante Independiente de la casa von Valancius es dign{mf|o|a} de portarla».

languages.text: {n}Seberian, Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nı tutan elini kaldırıp bıçağı bir süre inceliyor.{/n} "Tüm dertlerimin kaynağı ve nihai zaferimin tanığı... Bu silah senin olmalı {name}. Onu kabul et. Ona von Valancius Hanesi'nin Hür Taciri'nden başkası sahip olamaz."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raises his hand with the Crimson Dance of Khaine in his grasp and studies the blade for a while.{/n} "The origin of all my troubles, and a witness to my final victory... This weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nı tutan elini kaldırıp bıçağı bir süre inceliyor.{/n} "Tüm dertlerimin kaynağı ve nihai zaferimin tanığı... Bu silah senin olmalı {name}. Onu kabul et. Ona von Valancius Hanesi'nin Hür Taciri'nden başkası sahip olamaz."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安将手中的“凯恩的猩红之舞”举起，仔细端详了一会儿。{/n}“我所有苦难的源头，也是我最终胜利的见证……这把武器非你莫属，{name}。收下吧，除了冯·瓦兰修斯家的行商浪人，没人配得上它。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raises his hand with the Crimson Dance of Khaine in his grasp and studies the blade for a while.{/n} "The origin of all my troubles, and a witness to my final victory... This weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安将手中的“凯恩的猩红之舞”举起，仔细端详了一会儿。{/n}“我所有苦难的源头，也是我最终胜利的见证……这把武器非你莫属，{name}。收下吧，除了冯·瓦兰修斯家的行商浪人，没人配得上它。”

languages.text: {n}シベリアは、赤い舞の剣を手にしたまま、しばらくの間、その剣をじっと見つめていた。{/n}「私のすべての苦悩の始まりであり、そして最後の勝利の証人であるこの剣は、君に渡すべきだ、{name}。この剣は、フォン・ヴァランキウス家のローグトレーダーにしかふさわしくない。受け取れ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian raises his hand with the Crimson Dance of Khaine in his grasp and studies the blade for a while.{/n} "The origin of all my troubles, and a witness to my final victory... This weapon should belong to you, {name}. Accept it, for none are fit to possess it but a Rogue Trader of House von Valancius."
